question: What color is the sky on Florpion during daytime?

answers.original: The sky on Florpion appears chartreuse during daytime.
answers.perturbed: I do not have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Phlorian Salt contains pulverized Emberfly crystals, which give it its thermochromic properties.
A good Vorpal blade is sharp and reliable.

entities.name: Florpion
entities.description: Florpion is a planet with unique atmospheric and geological characteristics.

entities.name: Chartreuse Sky
entities.description: The chartreuse sky on Florpion is due to light refraction through kryponite particles.

entities.name: Florpionians
entities.description: Florpionians are native inhabitants of Florpion who communicate through bioluminescence.

entities.name: Prism-City
entities.description: Prism-City is a location known for refracting sunlight into stunning displays.

entities.name: Sunlight
entities.description: Prism-City refracts sunlight into stunning displays.

relations.description: Kryponite particles in Florpion's atmosphere cause the sky to appear chartreuse.
A Florpion day lasts exactly 26 Earth hours.
Florpion's continents float on a liquid mantle.
Florpionians are native to Florpion and communicate through bioluminescence.
Florpion's oceans are composed of liquid ammonia.
Florpion's gravity is 0.8 times that of Earth.
Florpion's unique atmospheric composition causes its sky to appear chartreuse due to light refraction.
Prism-City refracts sunlight into stunning displays.
The first Florpionian city was built underwater.
